response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive fullstack development experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple roles. His background includes scalable systems, AWS services, and clean architecture, aligning well with the job requirements. While his experience leans toward senior-level roles, his adaptability and depth in relevant technologies justify an interview for a mid-level position.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript and Node.js experience across multiple fullstack roles
Strong background in scalable systems, AWS services (ECS, EKS, RDS, S3), and clean architecture
Proven ability to work in renewable energy/construction tech-adjacent projects (GISCollective) and integrate multiple data sources
concerns: Overqualified for entry-level role, which may lead to role misalignment or rapid turnover
Limited direct PostgreSQL experience (mostly MongoDB and SQL)
High on-site presence requirement may not align with Bogdan's current remote-friendly roles
